Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Death is not a hunter unbeknownst to its prey.[n]One is always aware that it lies in wait.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Though life is merely a journey to the grave,[n]it must not be undertaken without hope.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Only then will a traveler's story live on,[n]treasured by those who bid him farewell.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Alas, my guest's life has now ended,[n]his tale left unwritten...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Game Over[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Resume play?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}You will return to the beginning of the operation and lose your current progress in it, except for the change in difficulty. Are you sure?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}You will return to the entrance of Tartarus and lose this visit's progress, except for the change in difficulty. Are you sure?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}You will return to the title screen and lose all progress made since you last saved the game. Are you sure?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}If you change the difficulty from Merciless, {f 0 1 2}you cannot change it back to Merciless later{f 0 1 27}. Do you still want to change to Hard difficulty?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Lower the difficulty by one level.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Start over from the beginning of the battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Start over from the beginning of the operation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Start over from the entrance of Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Return to the title screen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}The difficulty is currently set to {f 0 1 2}Easy{f 0 1 27}. Would you like to change it to {f 0 1 2}Peaceful{f 0 1 27}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}The difficulty is currently set to {f 0 1 2}Normal{f 0 1 27}. Would you like to change it to {f 0 1 2}Easy{f 0 1 27}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}The difficulty is currently set to {f 0 1 2}Hard{f 0 1 27}. Would you like to change it to {f 0 1 2}Normal{f 0 1 27}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}The difficulty is currently set to {f 0 1 2}Merciless{f 0 1 27}. Would you like to change it to {f 0 1 2}Hard{f 0 1 27}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The difficulty has been changed to {f 0 1 2}Peaceful{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The difficulty has been changed to {f 0 1 2}Easy{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The difficulty has been changed to {f 0 1 2}Normal{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The difficulty has been changed to {f 0 1 2}Hard{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
